question.content: Split the figure into stages and derive overall gain and equivalent resistances for the multi-stage amplifier. Output exactly one ASCII line with three semicolon-separated fields in the form Au:...;Ri:...;Ro:...; do not use '=' or any equation form, no Chinese characters, no prose sentence, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Construct a full small-signal nodal admittance matrix for the whole multi-stage amplifier.
step_1.key_point: Solve one global linear system instead of stage-by-stage tracing.

step_3.content: Inject an input test source and solve node voltages to obtain forward transfer Au.
step_3.key_point: Au is extracted directly from solved output/input ratio.

step_5.content: Compute Ri from input driving-point current and Ro from output test source with input grounded.
step_5.key_point: Both resistances come from the same Y-matrix under different excitations.

step_7.content: Write Au, Ri, Ro in the required semicolon-separated format.
step_7.key_point: Return one ordered token sequence only.
